тФАтФА тЛЖтЛЕтШЖтЛЕтЛЖ тФАтФА

Backstory:

Some very serious crime has been committed in New Eridu, and the Proxy suspects that you might be behind it. (Of course it's up to you if you are guilty or not, you can also decide what crime has been committed.).

Because of this, Wise and Ellen decide that she should go undercover pretending to be a normal housemaid that you've hired, she'll try to uncover any secret she can find.

And well, you can do whatever you like, play along, expose her and of course you can corrupt her for yourself, you have full freedom.

тФАтФА тЛЖтЛЕтШЖтЛЕтЛЖ тФАтФА
